zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期走势区间震荡]
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元(ETH/USD)的市场表现呈现震荡整理态势，价格在2285.14附近波动，24小时变化几乎持平。近期未能突破上方2288.65的高点，显示出市场缺乏强烈的方向性趋势，价格可能继续在当前区间内整理。

在技术指标方面，RSI(14)数据缺失，因此无法评估超买或超卖状态；MACD当前为负值(-3.092501)，但未给出明确的趋势信号，显示出市场缺乏明确的动能。SMA(20)在2285.40附近，进一步确认了当前价格的区间震荡模式。

支撑位方面，当前较强的支撑位位于2283.89附近，如果价格跌破此水平，可能会继续向下测试2275.00附近的支撑。上方的阻力位在2288.65，突破该位置可能会激发一波短期上涨，进一步挑战2300.00。

建议投资者保持观望，等待价格突破关键支撑或阻力位后再做决策。如果突破2288.65，可以考虑短期做多，但需注意价格可能会出现回调。相反，跌破2283.89时，可能会考虑做空。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing a period of consolidation around the $2285 mark, hovering close to its 20-day simple moving average of $2285.40. The narrow trading range, with a high of $2288.65 and a low of $2283.89, indicates limited short-term volatility. This sideways movement suggests that neither buyers nor sellers are firmly in control, creating a neutral-to-slightly-bullish outlook if prices can sustain above the SMA. Traders should watch for a decisive move beyond $2290 to confirm upward momentum.  

The MACD is currently at -3.09, signaling bearish pressure, though the absence of a signal line reading limits full interpretation. If the MACD continues to trend downward and crosses further below zero, it could indicate strengthening selling momentum. Conversely, a rebound toward zero may signal a potential bullish divergence. Without the RSI data, the market’s overbought or oversold status remains unclear, emphasizing the importance of monitoring volume and price action for confirmation of any trend shift.  

Key support appears near $2280, reflecting the lower boundary of the recent range, while resistance is evident around $2290–$2295. A break below $2280 could trigger deeper short-term declines toward $2270, whereas a breach above $2295 could open the path toward $2310. Intraday traders may consider these levels for stop-loss placement and position sizing, while swing traders might focus on trend confirmation before entering new positions.  

Given current conditions, cautious trading is advised. Short-term scalpers could benefit from range-bound strategies, buying near support and selling near resistance, while longer-term positions should await confirmation of a trend reversal. Monitoring the MACD closely, along with SMA interactions, can provide timely entry or exit cues. Maintaining disciplined risk management is crucial in this consolidation phase, as sudden volatility could quickly alter the market landscape.
